seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
mutation: composite: generalized assignment (each zone to at most one gate) generalized with a SECOND per-agent constraint -- a valve/cardinality limit K_j on the number of zones a gate may serve, on top of the discharge volume capacity C_j, making it GAP-with-cardinality (knapsack-per-gate with a slot budget).
title: Reservoir Dam Network: Spillway Release Allocation
strategies: first-fit reference: route each zone in input order through the lowest-index gate with both discharge room and a free valve slot (reproduces the checker baseline)
value-aware greedy: for each zone in order, pick the currently-feasible gate with the highest service value (ties -> smallest volume consumed)
regret-ordered construction + local search: order zones by best-minus-second-best value regret, assign to best feasible gate, then relocate/swap zones between gates to raise total value
flow/LP-relaxation rounding or metaheuristics: solve the fractional GAP-with-cardinality relaxation and round, or run seeded simulated-annealing / tabu over the two-constraint assignment
